display.purpose: Hero headings and page titles. Max 4.5rem (72px). Playfair Display 400.

headline.purpose: Section headings (h2). One per major section.

body.purpose: Paragraphs. Max 68ch line length. Color: #4A5568 on light backgrounds.

mono-eyebrow.purpose: Section kickers. Sparingly — one per section. Preceded by 28px gold bar.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Barely perceptible card differentiation. Almost never needed.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Hover lift on interactive cards. Not at rest.

shadows.name: gold-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA button on hover. Brand signature.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Entrance animations — exits use linear or short ease-in.

motion.name: default
motion.purpose: Component transitions: button lift, card hover.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Tablet QA target. Nav collapses at or below this.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main CTA. Gold pill with navy text at rest; darkens to gold-dark with cream text on hover. Arrow slides right.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 15px 26px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; background: #B08D57; color: #0A1626; border: 1px solid #B08D57; cursor: pointer; transition: all 400ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-arrow { display: inline-block; transition: transform 400ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6B4D1A; border-color: #6B4D1A; color: #F4F1EB; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(176, 141, 87, 0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-arrow { transform: translateX(4px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #B08D57; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 999px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Transparent with navy border; fills to navy on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 15px 26px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; background: transparent; color: #0A1626; border: 1px solid #0A1626; cursor: pointer; transition: all 400ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-arrow { display: inline-block; transition: transform 400ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #0A1626; color: #F4F1EB; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-outline:hover .ds-btn-arrow { transform: translateX(4px); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #B08D57; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 999px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Inline tertiary action. Text only with a bottom underline; no fill, no pill. Used alongside body copy.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 0; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; background: transparent; color: #0A1626; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid currentColor; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #7C5A1E; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #B08D57; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Primary nav link. Gold underline scales in from right on hover, left to right on active/current.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #1A1A1A; position: relative; padding: 4px 0; white-space: nowrap; transition: color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: -2px; width: 100%; height: 1px; background: #B08D57; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: right center; transition: transform 400ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); transform-origin: left center; } .ds-nav-link[aria-current='page']::after { transform: scaleX(1); transform-origin: left center; } .ds-nav-link[aria-current='page'] { color: #0A1626; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.description: Section kicker. JetBrains Mono, uppercase, preceded by a 28px gold bar. Sparingly — at most one per section.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Consolas, monospace; font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.16em; color: #6B7280; font-weight: 500; } .ds-eyebrow::before { content: ''; width: 28px; height: 1px; background: #B08D57; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Content card for service listings. Flat at rest; light lift on hover. Full border — never side-stripe.
components.html:
Support IT

Assistance informatique sur mesure pour PME bruxelloises.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #F4F1EB; border: 1px solid #DCD5C2; border-radius: 12px; padding: 32px; transition: box-shadow 400ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 400ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(10, 25, 41, 0.08); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(1.375rem, 2vw, 1.625rem); font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.08; letter-spacing: -0.015em; color: #1A1A1A; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.6; color: #4A5568; max-width: 68ch; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form text field. Warm-tinted background, gold focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #4A5568; } .ds-input { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 17px; background: #EDE8DC; border: 1px solid #DCD5C2; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #1A1A1A; transition: border-color 200ms, outline 200ms; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #0A1626; outline: 2px solid #B08D57; outline-offset: 0; border-radius: 8px; }

narrative.overview:
This is the design language of someone who has done this before and doesn't need to prove it. Composed, strategic, and unhurried — every element signals competence through restraint rather than loudness. The palette is a midnight boardroom with one precise accent: gold that is never decorative but always intentional. Typography shifts registers deliberately: Playfair Display for gravitas, Inter for clarity, JetBrains Mono for the precision of a specialist.

The system is mobile-first and bilingual in register — it speaks to the PME owner who has five minutes and a business problem, not a developer reading a spec. Every page has one clear next step. Shadows appear only when they carry information. Motion is purposeful and calm; no bounce, no flourish.

What this system explicitly rejects: transactional freelance profiles (Fiverr/Malt grids, hourly-rate energy, star ratings), generic IT agency stock aesthetics (stock photos of handshakes, blue gradient heroes), and anything that signals 'this was assembled from a template.'
keyCharacteristics: Dark navy anchors the brand; cream is the reading surface; gold is a precision accent used sparingly
Playfair Display italic for emphasis — gold on dark, italic on light
Pill-radius CTAs, flat cards, grain overlay on navy sections
Single clear CTA per section; no competing calls to action
Reduced-motion alternative for every animation; accessibility-first throughout

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Gold appears on at most 10% of any given screen. A page where gold is everywhere has no gold at all. Its rarity is the message.

rules.name: The Safe-Gold Rule
rules.body: #B08D57 (Burnished Gold) is decoration only. For any gold text on a light background, use #7C5A1E (Ledger Gold) exclusively. Contrast at #B08D57 on cream is 2.8:1 — prohibited.

rules.name: The Italic Accent Rule
rules.body: <em> elements render in Ledger Gold on light sections and Soft Gold on dark sections. This is the primary typographic signal for proper names, specialist terms, and brand taglines — not for generic emphasis.

rules.name: The Mono Signal Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono appears only in the eyebrow/overline context. Never in body copy or headings.

rules.name: The Grain Truth
rules.body: Navy sections carry a subtle SVG fractalNoise grain overlay at 50% opacity, mix-blend-mode: overlay. Cream sections are clean — no texture.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: At rest, all surfaces are flat. The first shadow the eye encounters should be in a hover or focus state — never on an inert card in a grid.

dos: Use #7C5A1E (Ledger Gold) for any gold text on a cream/light background. Never #B08D57.
Keep gold to ≤10% of any screen's visible area.
Apply text-wrap: balance to h1–h3 and text-wrap: pretty to long prose.
Include a @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) alternative for every animation.
End every page with one single, unambiguous CTA pointing toward contact.
Use full pill radius on all buttons — the pill is a brand signature.
Mention Brussels context explicitly in hero and about copy.
Keep shadows flat at rest; first shadow appears only on hover or focus.
donts: Don't use #B08D57 (Burnished Gold) for body text on cream backgrounds — 2.8:1 contrast fails WCAG AA.
Don't create transactional layouts: hourly rate badges, star ratings, package grids.
Don't use stock-photo IT agency aesthetics: handshakes, server rooms, group collaboration photos.
Don't add a side-stripe border (border-left > 1px as colored accent) to cards or callouts.
Don't use the eyebrow label on every section heading — it's a signal, not scaffolding.
Don't introduce new color hues. The palette is closed: navy, cream, gold.
Don't use Playfair Display for body text — display-only.
Don't reinstate fixed day-rate pricing. Pricing is always 'sur mesure'.
